# PaginationUtilities.InvalidCursorCode field

The `-32602` code for an invalid / unrecognized cursor (§18/§22.4). Same value as [`InvalidParams`](../../Stackific.Mcp.JsonRpc/ErrorCodes/InvalidParams.md). Mirrors TS `INVALID_CURSOR_CODE`.

public const int InvalidCursorCode;
